mapper.sql: u.id, u.user_code, u.username, u.display_name, u.password_hash, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.avatar_bucket, u.avatar_object_key, u.avatar_content_type, u.avatar_updated_at, u.extra_metadata, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.is_deleted
mapper.select:
select distinct
from users u
inner join user_roles ur on ur.user_id = u.id inner join roles r on r.id = ur.role_id
where u.is_deleted = 0
and u.status = #{status}
and u.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and ( u.user_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.display_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and r.role_code = #{roleCode}
order by u.user_code asc, u.id asc
order by u.created_at desc, u.id desc
select r.role_code from user_roles ur inner join roles r on r.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by r.role_code asc

select distinct p.permission_code from user_roles ur inner join role_permissions rp on rp.role_id = ur.role_id inner join permissions p on p.id = rp.permission_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} order by p.permission_code asc
